Accordion.name: Accordion
Accordion.description: A vertically stacked disclosure component that allows users to expand and collapse sections of related content. It manages state visibility, keyboard accessibility, and animation timing, and should not be used for navigation or page transitions.

ActionMenu.name: ActionMenu
ActionMenu.intent: Contextual action list for local operations
ActionMenu.description: A contextual action surface triggered by a button or icon that exposes secondary, object-specific actions. It manages positioning, keyboard navigation, focus behavior, and dismissal, and is not intended for primary navigation.

AppShell.name: AppShell
AppShell.intent: Top-level application shell and page structure
AppShell.purpose: Top-level application shell that composes menu, listview, main, side panel, and footer regions for consistent page architecture.
AppShell.description: The structural application layout framework that governs global regions such as menu, listview, main content, side panel, and footer while enforcing consistent structure, theme/brand application, and layout configuration.

listview.description: Optional left contextual rail via AppShell.Listview.

sidePanel.description: Optional right contextual rail via AppShell.SidePanel.

Avatar.name: Avatar
Avatar.intent: Visual identity for people or entities
Avatar.description: A visual identity component representing a person, organization, or system entity via image, initials, or fallback icon. It manages size, shape, and status indicators but not profile interactions.

Badge.name: Badge
Badge.description: A compact visual indicator for status, counts, or contextual metadata, typically attached to another UI element. It manages semantic state color and sizing.

Branding.name: Branding
Branding.description: A brand-aware component for rendering logos, wordmarks, and brand identifiers based on active brand and theme context.

Breadcrumb.name: Breadcrumb
Breadcrumb.description: A hierarchical navigation aid that communicates location within application structure with consistent spacing and truncation.

Button.name: Button
Button.description: An interactive control for triggering actions such as submissions, navigation, or state changes, with support for multiple variants, sizes, icon placements, and disabled states.

ButtonGroup.name: ButtonGroup
ButtonGroup.purpose: Groups related button actions with consistent spacing and orientation.
ButtonGroup.description: A compositional wrapper that arranges multiple Button actions with consistent spacing and orientation for related decisions.

Calendar.name: Calendar
Calendar.description: A full calendar visualization for selecting and viewing dates across weeks and months, with keyboard interaction and focus handling.

Checkbox.name: Checkbox
Checkbox.description: A binary selection control for independently selecting multiple options, including checked, unchecked, and indeterminate states.

CheckboxGroup.name: CheckboxGroup
CheckboxGroup.purpose: Provides grouped multi-select choices using Checkbox controls.
CheckboxGroup.description: A grouped set of Checkbox controls for selecting multiple options with shared label, orientation, and change handling.

Checklist.name: Checklist
Checklist.intent: Sidebar step checklist with completion progress
Checklist.purpose: Sidebar checklist for multi-step flows with completion status.
Checklist.description: A vertical step checklist used as a sidebar to track progress through multi-step workflows and forms.

Chip.name: Chip
Chip.description: A compact, optionally removable element representing user input, filter criteria, or selected values.

Container.name: Container
Container.purpose: Provides a reusable content wrapper with optional filled or transparent surface styles and standardized padding.
Container.description: A structural layout wrapper that enforces width constraints, horizontal padding, and alignment rhythm for consistent page sections.

CurrencyInput.name: CurrencyInput
CurrencyInput.description: A formatted amount input for monetary values with currency-friendly entry behavior.

DateInput.name: DateInput
DateInput.description: A single-field date input wrapper for capturing calendar dates.

DateRangeInput.name: DateRangeInput
DateRangeInput.description: A paired date input control for capturing start and end dates.

Datepicker.name: Datepicker
Datepicker.description: A composite input component combining text entry and calendar selection for date input, including formatting and accessibility behavior.

DescriptionList.name: DescriptionList
DescriptionList.purpose: Compact key-value metadata layout for detail and summary views.
DescriptionList.description: A compact definition-list style component for rendering labeled values in dense details views, side panels, and metadata cards.

Dialog.name: Dialog
Dialog.description: A modal interaction surface requiring user attention before proceeding, with focus trapping, overlay behavior, and escape dismissal.

Divider.name: Divider
Divider.description: A non-interactive visual separator for distinguishing sections of content with consistent spacing and alignment.

DotStatus.name: DotStatus
DotStatus.description: A minimal color-coded dot used to communicate state visually and intended to be paired with accessible text.

Dropdown.name: Dropdown
Dropdown.description: A selectable list component that expands from a trigger to allow single-option selection, including open/close behavior and keyboard navigation.

EmptyState.name: EmptyState
EmptyState.purpose: Provide a clear, branded fallback when a section has no content, data, or search results.
EmptyState.description: A structured placeholder pattern shown when no data exists, providing context and guidance so users can move forward instead of seeing a blank interface.

EventCard.name: EventCard
EventCard.intent: Event summary in a compact card
EventCard.description: A specialized content container optimized for presenting event metadata such as date, time, location, and status.

Field.name: Field
Field.description: A compositional wrapper that pairs form controls with label, helper text, validation messaging, and accessibility relationships.

FileUpload.name: FileUpload
FileUpload.description: An input for uploading files via drag-and-drop or system picker with visual states for progress, selected files, and errors.

instructionText.default: Drop files here or click to upload

defaults.instructionText: Drop files here or click to upload

Flex.name: Flex
Flex.purpose: Creates token-driven flexbox layouts with controlled direction, alignment, wrapping, and spacing.
Flex.description: A flexbox-based layout primitive for direction, alignment, spacing, and wrapping using system tokens for predictable layout behavior.

Icon.name: Icon
Icon.description: A scalable vector icon component enforcing consistent sizing, alignment, color token usage, and accessibility semantics.

ImageAspect.name: ImageAspect
ImageAspect.description: A responsive image container that preserves a predefined aspect ratio across screen sizes without distortion.

Key.name: Key
Key.description: A structured key-value style component for labeled metadata such as properties, details, and compact information pairs.

Layout.name: Layout
Layout.purpose: Creates token-driven flexbox layouts with controlled direction, alignment, wrapping, and width behavior.
Layout.description: A structural layout component for arranging content regions and width behavior.

Menu.name: Menu
Menu.intent: Main app navigation and mode controls
Menu.description: A structured vertical list of navigation options or actions with active states, keyboard support, and optional hierarchy.

MicroCalendar.name: MicroCalendar
MicroCalendar.description: A compact calendar view for dashboards and side panels where full calendar interaction is unnecessary.

Modal.name: Modal
Modal.description: A centered or full-screen overlay surface for focused interactions, managing stacking, overlay behavior, and dismissal.

NumberInput.name: NumberInput
NumberInput.description: A number-constrained text input for integer and decimal entry.

Pagination.name: Pagination
Pagination.description: A control for navigating large datasets split across pages while preserving context of current and total pages.

PasswordInput.name: PasswordInput
PasswordInput.description: A secure text input for password entry with masking behavior.

PhoneInput.name: PhoneInput
PhoneInput.description: A phone number input with formatting and validation-oriented behavior.

ProgressCircle.name: ProgressCircle
ProgressCircle.description: A circular progress visualization for determinate completion percentages or indeterminate loading activity.

ProgressIndicator.name: ProgressIndicator
ProgressIndicator.description: A visual indicator for workflow progress, typically rendered as a linear bar or staged sequence.

ProvidersCard.name: ProvidersCard
ProvidersCard.purpose: Displays provider identity, status, metadata, tags, and quick actions in a compact card.
ProvidersCard.description: A card surface for presenting provider-centric summary information and actions.

Radio.name: Radio
Radio.description: A mutually exclusive selection control for grouped choices where only one option can be selected.

RadioGroup.name: RadioGroup
RadioGroup.purpose: Provides grouped single-select choices using Radio controls.
RadioGroup.description: A grouped set of Radio controls for selecting exactly one option with shared name, layout orientation, and state handling.

ScrollView.name: ScrollView
ScrollView.purpose: Provides a container with controlled scroll direction.
ScrollView.description: A constrained overflow region for content that requires vertical or horizontal scrolling.

SearchInput.name: SearchInput
SearchInput.description: A query-focused input used for search and filter interactions.

SectionHeader.name: SectionHeader
SectionHeader.description: A heading row pattern for section title, supporting text, and optional actions.

SelectableCard.name: SelectableCard
SelectableCard.purpose: Selectable surface for list rows and card-like actionable metadata items.
SelectableCard.description: An interactive row/card surface for selectable list content with leading, content, status, and trailing action slots.

Slider.name: Slider
Slider.description: A draggable range control for selecting numeric values with continuous or stepped adjustments.

Statistics.name: Statistics
Statistics.purpose: Displays a KPI value with optional context, trend, and icon.
Statistics.description: A metric display component for KPI values with optional trend indication, helper context, and icon.

Status.name: Status
Status.description: A semantic indicator communicating system, object, or process condition with color, iconography, and text.

Steps.name: Steps
Steps.description: A structured sequence component for multi-step workflows showing completed, current, and upcoming stages.

Table.name: Table
Table.description: A row-and-column data grid supporting sorting/filtering hooks and row-level actions with accessible structure.

Tabs.name: Tabs
Tabs.description: A segmented navigation pattern for switching between related content areas within a shared container.

Tag.name: Tag
Tag.description: A compact metadata label for categorization, filtering, and visual grouping of related elements.

Text.name: Text
Text.purpose: Applies UDS typography variants with governed weight and leading options while preserving semantic tags via `as`.
Text.description: A typography component that adapts semantic styling and theme-aware text contrast across active brand and mode.

TextInput.name: TextInput
TextInput.description: A single-line input used for textual values such as names, titles, and search queries.

Textarea.name: Textarea
Textarea.description: A multi-line text input for longer content such as descriptions, comments, and notes.

TimeInput.name: TimeInput
TimeInput.description: A time-specific input used for schedule and appointment entry.

Toast.name: Toast
Toast.description: A temporary, non-blocking notification surface that provides brief system feedback and auto-dismisses.

Toggle.name: Toggle
Toggle.description: A binary switch for enabling or disabling a persistent setting or feature state.

Toolbar.name: Toolbar
Toolbar.intent: Top bar with edge actions and centered identity/title
Toolbar.purpose: Top action bar with three composable slots: left, center, and right.
Toolbar.description: A horizontal application bar that reserves left and right action regions and a centered title or branding slot.

Tooltip.name: Tooltip
Tooltip.description: A contextual overlay shown on hover or focus to provide supplemental information without interrupting workflow.

primaryAction.notes: Use one primary action per section max.

secondaryAction.notes: Use non-primary appearance for secondary actions.

sectionContainer.notes: Default section wrapper: transparent surface with 24px padding.

formFieldWrapper.notes: Wrap inputs that require label/helper/error messaging.

textInputControl.notes: Use TextInput for freeform single-line text.

statusIndicator.notes: Use semantic status component for state communication.

badgeLabel.notes: Use Tag for concise categorical labels.

contextualActions.notes: Use ActionMenu for row/object-level secondary actions.

dataPresentation.notes: Use Table for tabular datasets and structured records.

confirmationDialog.notes: Use Modal for confirmation/destructive decision points.
